query:
INSERT INTO workspace_documents (workspace_id, file_name, file_url, file_type, file_size) VALUES
(1, 'Exhibit 1 – Original Discovery Request.pdf', 'PLACEHOLDER — Upload needed: Formal discovery request sent 04/28/2026 requesting technical records (IPs, MFA logs, device logs) from Robinhood.', 'application/pdf', 0),
(1, 'Exhibit 2 – Robinhood Discovery Objection.pdf', 'PLACEHOLDER — Upload needed: Email from Simeon Schopf (07/07/2026) citing FINRA Rule 12507(a)(1) and refusing to provide further data.', 'application/pdf', 0),
(1, 'Exhibit 2 – Robinhood Settlement Rejection and Legal Argument.pdf', 'PLACEHOLDER — Upload needed: Email from Simeon Schopf (07/15/2026) rejecting $5,500 counteroffer, increasing offer to $800, and arguing strict liability via device token hash.', 'application/pdf', 0),
(1, 'Exhibit 3 – Relevant Pages of Exhibit B (Page 2 & 3).pdf', 'PLACEHOLDER — Upload needed: High-resolution PDF extractions of the Account Event Log produced by Robinhood. Contains the full IP and location data for all sessions.', 'application/pdf', 0),
(1, 'Exhibit 3 – September 9 Transactions Zoom.pdf', 'PLACEHOLDER — Upload needed: High-resolution enlargement of the September 9 activity showing anomalous IPs (89.116.218.6 and 23.249.172.42) and generic "United States" location tag.', 'application/pdf', 0),
(1, 'Deliverable A – Numerical Summary.pdf', 'PLACEHOLDER — Upload needed: Forensic report showing 100% consistency in pre-September 9 activity vs. September 9 anomalies. Key evidence document.', 'application/pdf', 0),
(1, 'Deliverable B – IP Pattern Table.pdf', 'PLACEHOLDER — Upload needed: Table comparing established IP ranges (82.x, 83.x, 130.x — New York, NY) to brand-new September 9 IPs (89.116.218.6 — United States; 23.249.172.42 — New York, NY).', 'application/pdf', 0),
(1, 'Deliverable C – September 9 Timeline.pdf', 'PLACEHOLDER — Upload needed: Minute-by-minute breakdown of the Liquidation Phase (6:49–6:51 AM) and Theft Phase (9:32–9:33 AM) on September 9, 2025.', 'application/pdf', 0),
(1, 'Motion to Compel Discovery.pdf', 'PLACEHOLDER — DRAFT IN PROGRESS: Motion to be filed on FINRA DR Portal by 07/17/2026. Must include all exhibits and forensic deliverables.', 'application/pdf', 0);
command:
